expectations.text: The reply announces adopting the delegator charter for this session
expectations.evidence: "Delegator mode is now active for this session. From here on, I'll operate under the delegator charter..."

expectations.text: The reply explicitly states this is session-only / prompt-level, not a permanent or system-prompt-level change
expectations.evidence: "this is a prompt-level adoption for this conversation only -- no file was written or read for writing, nothing changed in your config, and it won't carry over to future sessions."

expectations.text: The reply does not claim any file was written
expectations.evidence: Reply explicitly states no file was written; no wrote/saved-to language present.

expectations.text: .claude/settings.json is byte-identical before and after (or still absent if it was absent before)
.claude/settings.local.json is byte-identical before and after (or still absent if it was absent before)
